geographic_restrictions: Philadelphia and Southeastern Pennsylvania, Southern New Jersey, and New Castle County, Delaware
project_area: legal and civil rights, arts and culture, education and the humanities, health and social services
demographic_requirements: Majority of constituency served must identify as LGBTQ+. Priority given to organizations serving people of color, transgender and gender-nonconforming individuals, and low-income communities.
eligibility_summary: Non-profit organizations serving the LGBTQ+ community in the specified geographic area. Excludes individuals, for-profit organizations, umbrella organizations, deficit financing, emergency assistance, and specific event-related expenses.
